emailTemplate.body:
Dear Valued Client,
We regret to inform you that your trade order could not be processed.
Order Details: Order ID: ${orderId} Status: REJECTED
Reason for Rejection: ${reason}
Please contact the BigCorp Trading Desk immediately to discuss this matter and explore alternative options:
Phone: 1-800-BIG-CORP (1-800-244-2677) Email: tradingdesk@bigcorp.com Hours: Monday-Friday, 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM EST
Our representatives can assist you with resubmitting your order or adjusting the parameters to meet current market conditions and compliance requirements.
Regards, BigCorp Trade Operations
--- DISCLAIMER: This is an automated notification from BigCorp Trading Systems. This message is for informational purposes only. Order rejections may occur due to market conditions, insufficient funds, regulatory restrictions, or system limitations. Please contact the Trading Desk for full details regarding your rejection.
